source_spans.text: Water addition significantly increased the emergence of both surface-sown and buried (1 cm deep) seeds.

nodes.name: Emergence of both surface-sown and buried seeds

source_spans.text: Water addition significantly increased the emergence of both surface-sown and buried (1 cm deep) seeds.
Emergence was much greater for buried (80%) than surface-sown seeds (20%).
Herbicide treatment of neighbors did not increase the emergence of experimentally added seeds.
